lede: A look at April 30 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Stephen Harper and Jaroslav Hašek, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2021 Meron crowd crush
events.desc: Forty-five men and boys are killed in the Meron stampede in Israel.

events.title: April 2014 Ürümqi attack
events.desc: A bomb blast in Ürümqi, China kills three people and injures 79 others.

events.title: 2009 attack on the Dutch royal family
events.desc: Seven civilians and the perpetrator are killed and another ten injured at a Queen's Day parade in Apeldoorn, Netherlands in an attempted assassination on Queen Beatrix.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: The British submarine HMS Seraph surfaces near Huelva to cast adrift a dead man dressed as a courier and carrying false invasion plans.

events.title: Federal Prison Camp, Alderson
events.desc: The Federal Industrial Institute for Women opens in Alderson, West Virginia, as the first women's federal prison in the United States.

events.title: Hawaii
events.desc: Hawaii becomes a territory of the United States, with Sanford B. Dole as governor.

events.title: J. J. Thomson
events.desc: J. J. Thomson of the Cavendish Laboratory announces his discovery of the electron as a subatomic particle, over 1,800 times smaller than a proton (in the atomic nucleus), at a lecture at the Royal Institution in London.

events.title: Nicaragua
events.desc: Nicaragua declares independence from the Central American Federation.

events.title: Louisiana Purchase
events.desc: Louisiana Purchase: The United States purchases the Louisiana Territory from France for $15 million, more than doubling the size of the young nation.

events.title: AD 311
events.desc: The Diocletianic Persecution of Christians in the Roman Empire ends.

births.name: Stephen Harper
births.line: Canadian economist and politician, 22nd Prime Minister of Canada

deaths.text: Adolf Hitler, Austrian-German politician and author, dictator of Nazi Germany

observances.text: Christian feast day: Amator, Peter and Louis
